sections.name: Pre-pizza
items: Hummus - celery, cucumbers, carrots, grilled garlic bread
Kale & Artichoke Dip - roasted red peppers, garlic cream, bread crumbs, garlic toast
Parlor Pizza Bread - house beer bread topped with garlic, mozzarella, shallot, parmesan, pepperoni, scallion cream, cherry peppers, sesame seeds
Glazed Brussels Sprouts - spicy maple syrup, toasted pumpkin & sesame seeds, lemon, roasted garlic & shallots
Hand Cut Frites - with sriracha honey mustard, jalapeño cream cheese sauce, ketchup

sections.name: Salads
items: Kale Cobb Salad - bacon, egg, scallion, avocado, tomatoes, blue cheese, buttermilk ranch
Antipasto Chopped Salad - prosciutto, pepperoni, artichoke hearts, pepperoncinis, provolone, tomatoes, olives, potatoes, creamy Italian dressing
Watermelon Salad - watermelon, feta cheese, roasted pistachios, honey lemon vinaigrette, fresh mint
Caesar Salad - garlic bread crostini, crispy parmesan cheese, Greek yogurt Caesar dressing
Super Green Salad - spinach, kale, romaine, parmesan, green olives, broccoli, asparagus, avocado, pistachios, chili flakes, avocado vinaigrette

notes: Stored from a user paste so future rescans can use the pasted menu text without refetching the website.
The pasted menu explicitly listed pistachios on the Watermelon Salad and Super Green Salad.
